Evaluation Rubric: This is for the reviewer, but candidates can also read it to understand what matters.

__EMPTY: Explains the developer problem clearly and chooses a sensible scope.
Shows a coherent user journey and useful reasoning, not just charts.
React app is clear, usable, and easy to follow.
Uses the sample data sensibly and keeps the implementation simple.
Video is clear, structured, and understandable.
Used AI well without losing originality or understanding.
